candidate.name: Your Name
candidate.title: Senior Role Title — your headline here
candidate.tagline: Languages | Years of experience | Key positioning

professional_profile: One paragraph (3-5 sentences) describing your career arc, what you're known for, and the value you bring. The AI uses this as a seed for the tailored profile.

core_competencies.label: Achievement Pillar 1
core_competencies.statement: A specific, measurable outcome you've delivered. Include a number.

core_competencies.label: Achievement Pillar 2
core_competencies.statement: Another quantified achievement that signals seniority.

core_competencies.label: Achievement Pillar 3
core_competencies.statement: A third pillar that complements the others.

brand_pillars: Three to five short phrases describing what makes you distinctive.
Used by the AI to lace personality into the cover letter.

highlights: Achievement statement with a specific metric (e.g., 30% improvement, $2M revenue, 50+ clients).
A third highlight with a clear quantitative result.

experience_modules.group_name: Earlier Career (optional grouping for older roles)

roles.impact: One-line summary of impact at this role.

creative: List the design / creative tools you actually use.
ai: LLM tools and AI workflows you're proficient with.
Optional but valuable on a 2026 CV.
